case_title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. KEITH DELORIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 69854305) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DELORIO, KEITH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DELORIO, KEITH DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELORIO, KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 SERRANO DRIVE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY.**SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69854305)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69854305), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC , A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED MAR-17-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
